title: Rosa collinderi
taxonomy: Rosa collinderi is classified within the genus Rosa, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Rosaceae. The species Rosa collinderi is a member of the subgenus Hulthemia, which is a group of roses that are native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The genus Rosa is further divided into several subgenera, with Hulthemia being one of the most ancient and primitive subgenera. Rosa collinderi is a rare and endangered species of rose, found primarily in the mountainous regions of China and Tibet. It is considered a unique and valuable species due to its distinctive characteristics and limited geographical distribution.
